title: Codex执政官发布收口事故与GitHub-AI协作治理全景审计报告-2026-07-19

local_and_remote_observations.fact: Release On Main failed during Set up job because actions/setup-node pinned SHA ...0021 could not be resolved.
PR #27 merged as 6b3cfe30; v0.6.0-alpha tag and Release do not exist.
main protection is active; Dependabot alerts, automated security fixes, vulnerability alerts and CodeQL default setup are disabled or not configured; secret scanning and push protection are enabled.
Account ga626 reports two_factor_authentication false, no pinned repositories, no public profile README repository, and no public social accounts.

external_evidence.claim: Use least-privilege GITHUB_TOKEN permissions and elevate only individual jobs.
Branch protection can require pull requests, checks, conversation resolution and other merge controls; duplicate job names can make required checks ambiguous.
Dependabot alerts are a repository security capability that must be enabled independently of dependabot.yml update configuration.
Secret scanning and push protection are separate repository security controls.
Code scanning is a distinct security analysis capability and requires setup.
Profile README and pinned items are first-class public profile surfaces; public information should be deliberately chosen.
AGENTS.md, Skills, MCP and Plugins are complementary; keep AGENTS.md small and use the closest persistent layer for each kind of instruction.

gaps_and_limits.reason: Official manual HEAD request returned HTTP 403 in this environment; no OpenAI Docs MCP tool was exposed in the thread.
gaps_and_limits.fallback: KnowledgeRadar extracted public developers.openai.com pages after route admission.

gaps_and_limits.reason: OpenAlex results did not reliably match AI coding agent CI governance; irrelevant results were excluded.

gaps_and_limits.surface: account settings unavailable by standard API
gaps_and_limits.reason: Passkeys, recovery codes, default repository visibility and several personal UI preferences require owner-side UI verification.
